scripts.dev: npm run dev:backend & npm run dev:frontend & npm run dev:agent
scripts.kill: { lsof -ti :3000; lsof -ti :5173; lsof -ti :3001; } | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.test: npm run test -w backend -w frontend && npm run cypress:run --workspace=frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w backend -w frontend -w sdk -w agent -w mcp
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix -w backend -w frontend -w sdk -w agent -w mcp
